theme_archetype.rationale: Breaking the generic purple/mint gradients typical of casual web games. Going for a tactile, high-tension 'Bauhaus digital' aesthetic. Sharp geometry, stark ivory background, thick black grids, and pure primary colors to invoke physical nostalgia and architectural precision.

rules.contrast: Strict high contrast. No subtle grays or drop shadows. Shadows must be solid #111111.
rules.hover_states: Hovering interactive elements should shift to accent_yellow (#FFCC00) or invert to pure black.
rules.player_colors: Player 1 (X) MUST ONLY use primary_red (#FF3333). Player 2 (O) MUST ONLY use primary_blue (#0033CC). Never mix these.

typography.rules: Cabinet Grotesk for dramatic, oversized announcements (e.g., 'X WINS'). Azeret Mono for all functional data (scores, inputs, buttons, history) to feel like a raw digital machine.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: Asymmetric, structural grid. Title on top-left, game board anchored center, scores and history pushed to right or bottom in rigid blocks.
layout_and_spacing.board_container: Use grid-cols-3 with gap-2. The board container MUST have bg-[#111111] (black) so the gaps act as the thick monolithic 8px borders of the Tic Tac Toe board. Each cell has bg-[#F4F4EC].
layout_and_spacing.general_spacing: Generous spacing (p-8 to p-12). Containers with borders must use internal padding p-6 to avoid collision.

game_board_cell.base: w-24 h-24 sm:w-32 sm:h-32 bg-[#F4F4EC] flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer transition-colors duration-150 relative
game_board_cell.x_mark: SVG line cross. stroke-[#FF3333], strokeWidth='12', strokeLinecap='square'.
game_board_cell.o_mark: SVG perfect circle. stroke-[#0033CC], strokeWidth='12', fill='transparent'.

buttons.base: font-mono text-sm uppercase font-bold px-6 py-3 bg-white text-[#111111] border-4 border-[#111111] shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#111111] transition-transform duration-100

score_panel.style: Neo-brutalist card. border-4 border-[#111111] bg-white p-6 shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#111111]
score_panel.layout: Flex container with monospace numbers. Player 1 name/score in #FF3333, Player 2 in #0033CC.

inputs.style: border-b-4 border-[#111111] bg-transparent text-xl font-mono focus:outline-none focus:border-[#FFCC00] focus:bg-white p-2 transition-colors placeholder:text-[#555555] w-full

leaderboard.style: border-4 border-[#111111] bg-white mt-8 font-mono text-sm max-h-[200px] overflow-y-auto shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#111111]

mode_selector.style: Flex container, toggle buttons sharing a thick black border. Active state: bg-[#111111] text-white. Inactive: bg-white text-[#111111].

motion_and_interaction.transitions: Keep them snappy and mechanical. 100ms-150ms max. No 'eased' floating animations.
motion_and_interaction.win_animation: Draw a thick solid #111111 SVG line over the winning cells. The winning cells should pulse or invert colors rapidly.
motion_and_interaction.accessibility: MUST respect prefers-reduced-motion. Disable shakes and rapid pulsing if enabled.

background_texture.usage: Overlay entire app with this texture: fixed inset-0, pointer-events-none, mix-blend-multiply, opacity-40. It adds tactile 'paper/poster' grit to the Bauhaus geometry.

media_and_assets.icons: Use lucide-react for UI icons (settings, reset), but set strokeWidth to 3 to match the heavy structural feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Inject the provided Google Fonts/Fontshare URLs into the main index.html or global CSS.
Build the layout completely avoiding generic centered cards. Position the title massive on the top-left, game board anchored in the center, and scores/history on the right or bottom in rigid blocks.
Do NOT use Shadcn Card components for the board or score panels. Use pure HTML/Tailwind with thick borders (border-4 border-[#111111]) and hard shadows (shadow-[8px_8px_0px_#111111]).
The game board MUST be constructed using a CSS grid (grid-cols-3) with a black container background and gap-2 to create the thick monolithic grid lines. DO NOT draw individual borders on cells.
Implement testing attributes rigorously exactly as specified: data-testid='board-cell-0' to 'board-cell-8', data-testid='game-status-message', data-testid='mode-selector'.
Do not use generic 'X' and 'O' text characters for the game pieces. Use SVGs with strokeWidth='12' and square caps to match the geometric aesthetic.
Ensure contrast rules are met, especially over the textured background. Use solid colors.
